    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model containing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, MDEMethodologies
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, HealthEffectManagementService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data exchange and real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, HealthEffectManagementService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin representation and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, HealthEffectManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance MDEMethodologies : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, HealthEffectManagementService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"

]

]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance HealthEffectManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

]

instance ModularServiceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented components for scalability via standardized extension points"
]

instance LivingLab : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain for real-time monitoring and optimization of building operations"

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT sent to actuators in the BCS via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time adjustment of building systems."
]

    base:desc "Real-time synchronization for data exchange and service execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [

]

]

]
